sample_requests: Run MSEA ORA at padj<0.20 on the cachexia DEG, plot a pathway dot plot, cross-validate with GSEA on the same DEG ranking
Treatment x time crossed design: run ASCA with 500 permutations and plot the variance partition
Repeated-measures study: per-feature MixedLM with formula='treatment + time', groups='patient', report the treatment[T.drug] coefficient
Two-group time-series MEBA on a planted-interaction synthetic dataset
Detect metabolite pairs whose Spearman correlation rewires between cachexic and control with DGCA + dgca_class_bar
Build per-condition correlation networks at |r|>=0.5, padj<0.05 and compare shared / specific edges
Joint MOFA+ on metabolomics + RNA-seq with 5 factors, scale_views=True, save the model to mofa.hdf5
Reproduce the MTBLS1 worked example end-to-end: ingest, sample-QC, CV-filter, full preprocessing, multivariate, MSEA, ASCA, biomarker panel, DGCA, correlation network

validation_budget.skip_reason: Source-grounded via inspect.signature / inspect.getdoc and direct reads of omicverse/metabol/{_msea,_multifactor,_correlation,_integration,_id_mapping,plotting}.py plus omicverse/utils/load_metabolights. No live smoke harness; the synthetic-MEBA-recovery and TCA-pathway-recovery checks documented in the source notebooks serve as in-skill acceptance probes.
